_description: Phishing click-through to a credential-harvest page. Three events: email delivered (sender domain `acme-paychecks.com`, registered 9 days ago); proxy URL click ~6 min after delivery; proxy form-post capture with `username` + `password` fields. Routes through the `email_gateway` and `web_proxy` connector profiles (OCSF class_uid 4009 + 4012).
_usage:
aisoc submit examples/alerts/phishing-payload.json   # real ingest
basoc-sandbox demo --scenario phishing-payload   # offline simulator

events.subject: Action required: payslip access expires today
